query.description: Gmail search query, for example 'newer_than:7d -category:promotions' or 'is:unread'.

label_ids.description: Optional Gmail label ids to filter by.

max_results.description: Maximum messages to return. Defaults to 10 and is capped at 50.

body_preview_chars.description: Maximum characters retained from Gmail's already-short API snippet per message. This does not fetch or expand the full message body. Defaults to 500.
